summary: Iteration 24 - Tested new AI Release Strategy feature. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. The feature uses real Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o) for AI generation - NOT MOCKED.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: POST /api/ai/release-strategy requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
POST /api/ai/release-strategy basic request returns correct structure (strategy, generated_at, data_summary)
POST /api/ai/release-strategy accepts optional release_title and genre fields
Strategy response contains all required fields: optimal_release_day, optimal_release_time, target_platforms, geographic_strategy, pre_release_timeline, promotion_tips
data_summary contains: total_streams, top_platform, top_country, peak_hour
target_platforms has correct structure (platform, priority, tactic)
geographic_strategy has correct structure (region, tactic)
pre_release_timeline has correct structure (days_before, action)
promotion_tips is a list of strings
GET /api/fan-analytics/overview returns data with platforms and countries
Frontend: Fan Analytics page loads with all charts and data
Frontend: AI Release Strategy section visible at bottom with data-testid='ai-strategy-section'
Frontend: Release title input field present (data-testid='strategy-release-title')
Frontend: Genre input field present (data-testid='strategy-genre')
Frontend: Generate AI Strategy button present (data-testid='generate-strategy-btn')
Frontend: Loading state shows 'Analyzing your audience data...'
Frontend: Strategy results display with data-testid='strategy-results'
Frontend: Optimal release day displayed (Friday)
Frontend: Optimal release time displayed (11:00 UTC)
Frontend: Platform strategy cards displayed (4 platforms)
Frontend: Geographic strategy items displayed (3 regions)
Frontend: Pre-release timeline items displayed (4 items)
Frontend: Promotion tips displayed (3 tips)
Frontend: Regenerate strategy button works (data-testid='regenerate-strategy-btn')
critical_code_review_comments: AI Release Strategy uses REAL Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o) - NOT MOCKED
Backend aggregates data from stream_events, presave_campaigns, and releases collections
Fallback strategy provided if AI call fails
JSON parsing handles markdown-wrapped responses from LLM
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 tested the new AI Release Strategy feature. Backend endpoint POST /api/ai/release-strategy returns structured JSON with: strategy (optimal_release_day, optimal_release_time, target_platforms, geographic_strategy, pre_release_timeline, promotion_tips) and data_summary (total_streams, top_platform, top_country, peak_hour). Frontend section at bottom of /fan-analytics page with input fields for release_title and genre, Generate button, loading state, and results display. Uses REAL Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o) for AI generation. AI call takes 5-15 seconds.
